title: Merge SQL and Mapping Enhancements from Production to Staging
description: Merge the SQL code generation updates and the mapping side panel auto-select feature (MBT-511, MBT-482) from production into the staging environment. These enhancements were deployed directly to production for a customer demo and need to be synchronized back to the development/staging branch.
acceptance_criteria: SQL generation enhancements from MBT-482 are available on staging
Mapping auto-select feature from MBT-511 is available on staging
implementation_notes: Code was deployed to production first for a time-sensitive customer demo, requiring a reverse merge to staging to keep environments in sync.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the specific tickets (MBT-511, MBT-482) that needed merging and completed the merge to staging.
